|xpbonus = 0 |max hit = 5 |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = Yes |attack style = [[Stab]], [[Ranged]] |attack speed = Varies |hitpoints = 37 |att = 42 |str = 41 |def = 40 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 50 |drange = 50 |immunepoison = Not immune |immunevenom = Not immune |immunecannon = No |id = 1077 |leagueRegion = Misthalin }} }} '''Tolna Talvoy''' is the child of [[Launa]] and [[Brana]] Talvoy. When he was young, he left home as he wanted something greater than what he had.{{CiteNPC |npc=Tolna |quote=I can't live with your rules any more. Mother. I'm tired of working hard for very little money. There's great wealth that's mine for the taking! |loc=A Soul's Bane }} He heard rumours of a lost civilisation east of [[Varrock]] and went in search of it, but when he reached the site, a [[Tolna's rift|rift]] opened up in the ground and swallowed him.{{CiteNPC |npc=Tolna |quote=I managed to find the remnants of the ancient civilisation that the stories talked about. It seems people used to worship a god there years ago in numbers far greater than a simple cult following. Sadly there is little remaining so I have nothing else to tell. As soon as I entered this area the ground swallowed me whole. |loc=A Soul's Bane }} His parents tried to find him, searching for 25 years.{{CiteNPC |npc=Launa |quote=No. You see I haven't seen him for... for.... 25 years now. |loc=A Soul's Bane }}{{CiteNPC |npc=Brana |quote=Sorry, but your mother and I... tried so hard to find you! |loc=A Soul's Bane }} Eventually, the rift reopened in either Year 168 or 169 of the [[Fifth Age]], and people began spelunking into it, only to never return.{{CiteNPC |npc=Launa |quote=Oh I wish I knew for sure.... All I do know is that it opened seemingly by itself few months ago. It was first discovered by the students over at the digsite, a few of which have gone down there, but never returned. They told me about it straight way. |loc=A Soul's Bane }} Amongst those to have gone down into the rift was Brana.{{CiteNPC |npc=Launa |quote=My husband [Brana] went to look, but he hasn't returned for days. |loc=A Soul's Bane }} An adventurer went down to search for Tolna and Brana. Down there, physical manifestations of Tolna's feelings appeared, and they had to deal with the various angry creatures, the [[fear reaper]]s, the [[confusion beast]]s and the [[hopeless creature]]s. When they reached the centre of the rift, they found Brana trying to comfort Tolna, who had been warped into a monster. The adventurer stopped Tolna from killing his father, vanquishing the evil that had corrupted him, and the three of them returned to the surface. He realised his foolishness and made up with his parents,{{CiteNPC |npc=Tolna |quote=I was foolish to ignore my parents' warnings when I ran away that day. Luckily I've been able to patch things up with them so they've returned home with peace of mind. |loc=A Soul's Bane }} and remained by the rift to warn people of the danger and to guide them to the combat arena that had appeared.{{CiteNPC |npc=Tolna |quote=I've decided to keep open the rift. There is a part of it that is perfectly laid out for combat training and remnants of my subconscious remain in there. I want to show people the problems I have faced, so that they may learn from them. You're welcome to go down there and practice fighting any time. |loc=A Soul's Bane }} ==As a monster== [[File:A Soul's Bane - Fighting Tolna.png|thumb|left|190px|A player battles Tolna in order to restore him to normal.]] The dungeon's power morphed Tolna into a three-headed abomination who is killed in the final part of the quest. All three heads must be defeated. They are [[poison]]ous and easy to defeat for their level. In addition, if a player poisons one head, then all the heads are poisoned. Each of the three heads, while having the same stats and defence bonuses, have varying attack styles and [[monster attack speed|attack speeds]] that differ depending on whether the player is within melee distance of the heads. For example, the eastern head does not use melee attacks while the other two heads do. Despite the long-distance attacks having a magical appearance, they are considered [[Ranged]]. {|class=wikitable style="text-align:center;" !Head !Attack speed
(ranged) !Attack speed
(melee) |- |Southern |7 (''every 4.2 seconds'') |8 (''every 4.8 seconds'') |- |Eastern |5 (''every 3 seconds'') |N/A |- |Northern |20 (''every 12 seconds'') |3 (''every 1.8 seconds'') |} ==Dialogue== {{Hastranscript|npc}} ==Trivia== *Tolna's monster form has no chathead. Instead, his dialogue is spoken in the style of being told as a statement. *Tolna are similar to the dead hands in ''{{wp|Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time}}''. However, they have no main body like the dead hand. *Despite Tolna's eastern head never using melee attacks, casting [[Monster Examine]] on it reveals that it has a slash attack that attacks every 6 ticks. *Tolna's northern head has the slowest known [[monster attack speed]] of any NPC, attacking every 12 seconds when the player is out of its melee attack distance. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{A Soul's Bane}} [[Category:Bosses]] [[Category:Quest NPCs]] [[Category:Quest monsters]]
